skill.name: seo-content-refresher
skill.description: Identifies outdated elements in provided content and suggests updates to maintain freshness. Finds statistics, dates, and examples that need updating. Use PROACTIVELY for older content.
skill.summary: Identify and update outdated SEO content including statistics, dates, examples, and terminology to maintain search rankings.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only skill containing no executable code. The skill provides text-based guidance for refreshing SEO content through a structured prompt template. Static analysis shows 0 files scanned with 0 potential security issues. No scripts, network calls, filesystem access, or external command execution is present.

content.value_statement: SEO content loses rankings when statistics, dates, and examples become outdated. This skill analyzes your content and creates a prioritized refresh plan to restore and maintain search visibility.
actual_capabilities: Identify outdated statistics and data points in content
Detect old dates, examples, and case studies needing updates
Prioritize content refresh by ranking impact and traffic
Create actionable refresh checklists per page
Recommend new sections and trending topics to add
Generate content decay analysis with priority queue
limitations: Cannot access live website data or analytics
Cannot automatically update content - only provides recommendations
Requires manual verification of new statistics
Does not track competitor content changes

use_cases.title: Blog Post Refresh
use_cases.description: Analyze older blog posts to identify outdated statistics and examples, then create a refresh plan to update content and improve rankings.

use_cases.title: Website Audit
use_cases.description: Review a collection of pages to prioritize which content needs immediate updates based on ranking decline and traffic patterns.

use_cases.title: Content Calendar Planning
use_cases.description: Generate a content refresh calendar by identifying seasonal content and planning updates around industry events.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Content Scan
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the following content for outdated elements: [PASTE CONTENT]. Identify any statistics older than 2 years, dated examples, old case studies, expired references, and seasonal content that needs updating.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick scan of a single piece of content

prompt_templates.title: Priority Refresh Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: I have a website with multiple pages that need content refresh. URL: [URL], Last Updated: [DATE], Current Rankings: [LIST]. Analyze this content and create a prioritized refresh plan with specific action items.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a priority queue for multiple pages

prompt_templates.title: Statistics Update Guide
prompt_templates.prompt: The following content contains statistics from [YEAR]: [PASTE STATISTICS]. Research current data for [TOPIC] and provide updated statistics with sources for 2025.
prompt_templates.scenario: Finding current statistics to replace outdated data

prompt_templates.title: Comprehensive Content Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Perform a complete content freshness audit for my website [WEBSITE]. I want to identify: 1) Pages with declining rankings, 2) Content with statistics older than 2 years, 3) Seasonal content needing updates, 4) Pages missing current trends. Provide a refresh roadmap.
prompt_templates.scenario: Full website content audit and strategy

output_examples.input: Analyze this blog post about social media marketing from 2022 for outdated content: [CONTENT]
output_examples.output:
Content Refresh Plan:
- Priority: High (ranking declined 5 positions)
- Outdated Statistics: Instagram engagement rate (2022: 2.3% → 2025: 1.5%)
- Dated Examples: Case study from 2021 - recommend refresh
- Missing Trends: Add TikTok and short-form video section
- Action Items: Update all statistics, add 2024-2025 examples, refresh meta title

output_examples.input: Create a refresh strategy for my travel blog with 50 pages of content
output_examples.output:
Content Refresh Strategy:
- High Priority Pages: 12 (declining rankings, >2 years old)
- Medium Priority: 23 (stagnant, 1-2 years old)
- Low Priority: 15 (performing well)
- Quick Wins: Update meta titles with current year
- Recommended Timeline: Week 1-2 focus on high priority, Week 3-4 medium priority
- New Sections to Add: Post-pandemic travel trends, updated packing guides

best_practices: Update statistics quarterly to maintain accuracy and E-E-A-T signals
Prioritize high-traffic pages losing rankings for maximum impact
Add fresh examples and case studies when updating content
anti_patterns: Changing dates without updating actual content facts
Ignoring context and changing statistics that are still valid
Updating content too frequently without meaningful changes

faq.question: How often should I refresh my SEO content?
faq.answer: Review content every 6-12 months. High-performing pages may need annual updates, while rapidly changing topics like technology may need quarterly reviews.

faq.question: Does content refresh help rankings?
faq.answer: Yes, fresh content signals to search engines that your site is actively maintained. Updated statistics, current examples, and new information can improve rankings.

faq.question: What elements should I prioritize in content refresh?
faq.answer: Prioritize outdated statistics first, then dated examples, seasonal content, and finally terminology that sounds outdated. Statistics have the highest impact on E-E-A-T.

faq.question: Can this skill update my content automatically?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides analysis and recommendations. You must manually update the content based on the refresh plan provided.

faq.question: How do I know which pages need refreshing?
faq.answer: Focus on pages with declining rankings, content older than 2 years, pages receiving traffic but not converting, and any content with obvious outdated information.

faq.question: Should I change the URL when updating content?
faq.answer: Keep the same URL when refreshing content to preserve link equity. Update the modified date and consider adding a note at the top indicating the content was updated.
